name: Hummis Bi Tahini
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a food processor and blend until smooth.
2. Add the chickpeas and seasonings, then blend until the mixture is pureed.
3. Taste and adjust flavors as desired (typically, a bit more lemon juice enhances the flavor).
4. Note that the mixture before adding chickpeas can also be used for salad dressings; reduce garlic and thin with water if preferred. However, this will result in a dressing high in fat.
